heading: Our Team has Delivered Projects Across Following
description: A flexible platform mix lets us build the right tracking stack for movement, proximity, read-range, and operational intelligence.

items.name: GPS
items.description: GPS devices are fitted to track via network of satellites. Most suited for items which are on the move.

items.name: Bluetooth
items.description: Bluetooth devices are fitted to identify location via radio transmission. Most suited for items within certain premises/ blue tooth range.

items.name: RFID
items.description: RFID Tag transit data via radio frequency and most suited for factories, offices, items within read range of upto 10~15Mtrs.

items.name: NFC
items.description: NFC expands upon the models of High-frequency RFID and transforms the constraints of its working recurrence into a remarkable component of near-field communication.

items.name: QR Code
items.description: Quick Response Codes can hold larger information and have better readability.

items.name: Bar Code
items.description: Simplest form of data storage in machine readable form.
